description: TEST-ONLY example of the cited-values schema (Phase D unit 2). Every value is deliberately NON-PHYSICAL — a Cl 2p3/2 binding energy sits nowhere near 100 eV, no 2p spin-orbit splitting is 100 eV, and U 4f7/2 is nowhere near 200 eV. This file exists to demonstrate and test the schema; it must never be loaded into a production analysis. The loader forces every record from a test_only file to UNVERIFIED.

rows.source_citation: SYNTHETIC-TEST-ONLY — schema demonstration value, not a publication
